title: Uptown Girl
why_this_song: Uptown Girl by Billy Joel (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Uptown girl"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Uptown girl"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "She's been living in her uptown world"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You know I've seen her in her uptown world"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "She's been living in her uptown world"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: She's been living in her white-bred world
As long as anyone with hot blood can
And now she's looking for a downtown man

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "uptown" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "uptown" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: She's been living in her uptown world

exercises.prompt_en: "Uptown Girl" was released in 1983. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Uptown Girl" foi lançada em 1983. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Uptown Girl" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Uptown Girl" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
